revision.comment: 新規作成
revision.text:
{{神社 |画像 = [[ファイル:Tousho Shrine.jpg|250px]] {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=14|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|17|06.3|N|138|35|43.05|E}}}} |名称 = 當所神社 |所在地 = 静岡県富士宮市北山2018 | 緯度度 = 35 | 緯度分 = 17 | 緯度秒 = 06.3 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 138 |経度分 = 35 | 経度秒 = 43.05 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神 = [[素盞嗚命]]{{Sfn|浅間神社の歴史|1929|p=510}} |神体 = |社格 = |創建 = |本殿 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = }} '''當所神社'''（とうしょじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[富士宮市]]北山にある[[神社]]。
== 概要 == [[富士山本宮浅間大社]]の元[[摂社]]であり、同社と関係が深い。例えば富士山本宮浅間大社の年中行事を記した[[天正]]5年（[[1577年]]）『富士大宮神事帳』には正月行事として「北山當所之宮御神事」が記される{{Sfn|浅間文書纂|1973|p=6}}{{Sfn|合田|2004|p=41}}。
また[[慶安]]3年（[[1650年]]）の奥書を持つ『富士本宮年中祭礼之次第』においても正月行事として「北山とうすの宮神事」と見え、當所之宮神事が記される{{Sfn|浅間文書纂|1973|p=18}}。
== 脚注 == === 出典 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== 参考文献 == * {{Cite book|和書 |author = 浅間神社社務所 |year = 1929 |title = 浅間神社の歴史 |series = 富士の研究 |publisher = 古今書院 |isbn = |ref = {{SfnRef|浅間神社の歴史|1929}} }} * {{Cite book|和書 |author = 浅間神社社務所 |year = 1973 |title = 浅間文書纂 |series = |publisher = 名著刊行会 |isbn = |ref = {{SfnRef|浅間文書纂|1973}} }} *{{Cite journal|和書 |author = 合田尚樹 |date = 2004 |title = 戦国期における富士大宮浅間神社の地域的ネットワーク―「富士大宮神事帳」の史料的分析から― |journal = 武田氏研究 |issue = 30 |isbn = |pages = 30-51 |ref = {{SfnRef|合田|2004}} }}
== 関連項目 == * [[富士山本宮浅間大社]]

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[當所神社 (富士宮市)]] to [[Tōsho Shrine (Fujinomiya City)]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import
revision.text:
{{神社 |画像 = [[ファイル:Tousho Shrine.jpg|250px]] {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=14|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|17|06.3|N|138|35|43.05|E}}}} |名称 = 當所神社 |所在地 = 静岡県富士宮市北山2018 | 緯度度 = 35 | 緯度分 = 17 | 緯度秒 = 06.3 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 138 |経度分 = 35 | 経度秒 = 43.05 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神 = [[素盞嗚命]]{{Sfn|浅間神社の歴史|1929|p=510}} |神体 = |社格 = |創建 = |本殿 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = }} '''當所神社'''（とうしょじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[富士宮市]]北山にある[[神社]]。
== 概要 == [[富士山本宮浅間大社]]の元[[摂社]]であり、同社と関係が深い。例えば富士山本宮浅間大社の年中行事を記した[[天正]]5年（[[1577年]]）『富士大宮神事帳』には正月行事として「北山當所之宮御神事」が記される{{Sfn|浅間文書纂|1973|p=6}}{{Sfn|合田|2004|p=41}}。
また[[慶安]]3年（[[1650年]]）の奥書を持つ『富士本宮年中祭礼之次第』においても正月行事として「北山とうすの宮神事」と見え、當所之宮神事が記される{{Sfn|浅間文書纂|1973|p=18}}。
== 脚注 == === 出典 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}
== 参考文献 == * {{Cite book|和書 |author = 浅間神社社務所 |year = 1929 |title = 浅間神社の歴史 |series = 富士の研究 |publisher = 古今書院 |isbn = |ref = {{SfnRef|浅間神社の歴史|1929}} }} * {{Cite book|和書 |author = 浅間神社社務所 |year = 1973 |title = 浅間文書纂 |series = |publisher = 名著刊行会 |isbn = |ref = {{SfnRef|浅間文書纂|1973}} }} *{{Cite journal|和書 |author = 合田尚樹 |date = 2004 |title = 戦国期における富士大宮浅間神社の地域的ネットワーク―「富士大宮神事帳」の史料的分析から― |journal = 武田氏研究 |issue = 30 |isbn = |pages = 30-51 |ref = {{SfnRef|合田|2004}} }}
== 関連項目 == * [[富士山本宮浅間大社]]

|location=Kitayama 2018, [[:en:Fujinomiya, Shizuoka|Fujinomiya]], [[:en:Shizuoka Prefecture|Shizuoka Prefecture]], Japan
|Latitude degrees=35 |Latitude minutes=17 |Latitude seconds=06.3 |North/South=N
|Longitude degrees=138 |Longitude minutes=35 |Longitude seconds=43.05 |East/West=E
|Map Country Code=JP
|deity=[[Susanoo-no-Mikoto]]{{Sfn|History of Sengen Shrine|1929|p=510}}
}}

'''Tousho Shrine''' (當所神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in Kitayama, [[:en:Fujinomiya, Shizuoka|Fujinomiya]], [[:en:Shizuoka Prefecture|Shizuoka Prefecture]], Japan.

== Overview ==
The shrine was formerly a subordinate shrine (摂社) of the [[:en:Fujisan Hongū Sengen Taisha|Fujisan Hongū Sengen Taisha]] and maintains a strong historical connection with it. For example, the [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5 (1577) "Fujisan Hongū Sengen Shrine Ritual Records" (『富士大宮神事帳』) lists the "Kitayama Tousho Shrine Ritual" as one of the annual New Year ceremonies.<ref>{{Sfn|Collected Sengen Documents|1973|p=6}}{{Sfn|Goda|2004|p=41}}</ref>

Additionally, the "List of Annual Ceremonies for Fujisan Hongū" (『富士本宮年中祭礼之次第』), which has a colophon dated [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3 (1650), also references the "Kitayama Tousho Shrine Ritual" under New Year activities.<ref>{{Sfn|Collected Sengen Documents|1973|p=18}}</ref>

== References ==
=== Sources ===

{{Reflist}}

== Bibliography ==
* {{Cite book|和書
|author = Sengen Shrine Office
|year = 1929
|title = History of Sengen Shrine
|series = Studies on Mount Fuji
|publisher = Kokon Shoin
|isbn = 
|ref = {{SfnRef|History of Sengen Shrine|1929}}
}}
* {{Cite book|和書
|author = Sengen Shrine Office
|year = 1973
|title = Collected Sengen Documents
|series = 
|publisher = Meicho Kankokai
|isbn = 
|ref = {{SfnRef|Collected Sengen Documents|1973}}
}}
*{{Cite journal|和書
|author = Takaki Goda
|date = 2004
|title = Regional Networks of Fujisan Hongū Sengen Taisha during the Sengoku Period: An Analysis of the "Fujisan Hongū Ritual Records"
|journal = Takeda Clan Studies
|issue = 30
|isbn = 
|pages = 30-51
|ref = {{SfnRef|Goda|2004}}
}}
== See Also ==
* [[:en:Fujisan Hongū Sengen Taisha|Fujisan Hongū Sengen Taisha]]

'''Tousho Shrine''' (當所神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in Kitayama, [[:en:Fujinomiya, Shizuoka|Fujinomiya]], [[:en:Shizuoka Prefecture|Shizuoka Prefecture]], Japan.

== Overview ==
The shrine was formerly a subordinate shrine (摂社) of the [[:en:Fujisan Hongū Sengen Taisha|Fujisan Hongū Sengen Taisha]] and maintains a strong historical connection with it. For example, the [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5 (1577) "Fujisan Hongū Sengen Shrine Ritual Records" (『富士大宮神事帳』) lists the "Kitayama Tousho Shrine Ritual" as one of the annual New Year ceremonies.<ref>{{Sfn|Collected Sengen Documents|1973|p=6}}{{Sfn|Goda|2004|p=41}}</ref>

Additionally, the "List of Annual Ceremonies for Fujisan Hongū" (『富士本宮年中祭礼之次第』), which has a colophon dated [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3 (1650), also references the "Kitayama Tousho Shrine Ritual" under New Year activities.<ref>{{Sfn|Collected Sengen Documents|1973|p=18}}</ref>

=== Sources ===

'''Tousho Shrine''' (當所神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in Kitayama, [[:en:Fujinomiya, Shizuoka|Fujinomiya]], [[:en:Shizuoka Prefecture|Shizuoka Prefecture]], Japan.
== Overview == The shrine was formerly a subordinate shrine (摂社) of the [[:en:Fujisan Hongū Sengen Taisha|Fujisan Hongū Sengen Taisha]] and maintains a strong historical connection with it. For example, the [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5 (1577) "Fujisan Hongū Sengen Shrine Ritual Records" (『富士大宮神事帳』) lists the "Kitayama Tousho Shrine Ritual" as one of the annual New Year ceremonies.<ref>{{Sfn|Collected Sengen Documents|1973|p=6}}{{Sfn|Goda|2004|p=41}}</ref>
Additionally, the "List of Annual Ceremonies for Fujisan Hongū" (『富士本宮年中祭礼之次第』), which has a colophon dated [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3 (1650), also references the "Kitayama Tousho Shrine Ritual" under New Year activities.<ref>{{Sfn|Collected Sengen Documents|1973|p=18}}</ref>
== References == === Sources ===
{{Reflist}}

The shrine was formerly a subordinate shrine (摂社) of the [[:en:Fujisan Hongū Sengen Taisha|Fujisan Hongū Sengen Taisha]] and maintains a strong historical connection with it. For example, the [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5 (1577) "Fujisan Hongū Sengen Shrine Ritual Records" (『富士大宮神事帳』) lists the "Kitayama Tousho Shrine Ritual" as one of the annual New Year ceremonies.<ref>{{Sfn|Collected Sengen Documents|1973|p=6}}{{Sfn|Goda|2004|p=41}}</ref>

Additionally, the "List of Annual Ceremonies for Fujisan Hongū" (『富士本宮年中祭礼之次第』), which has a colophon dated [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3 (1650), also references the "Kitayama Tousho Shrine Ritual" under New Year activities.<ref>{{Sfn|Collected Sengen Documents|1973|p=18}}</ref>

'''Tousho Shrine''' (當所神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in Kitayama, [[:en:Fujinomiya, Shizuoka|Fujinomiya]], [[:en:Shizuoka Prefecture|Shizuoka Prefecture]], Japan.
== Overview == The shrine was formerly a subordinate shrine (摂社) of the [[:en:Fujisan Hongū Sengen Taisha|Fujisan Hongū Sengen Taisha]] and maintains a strong historical connection with it. For example, the [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 5 (1577) "Fujisan Hongū Sengen Shrine Ritual Records" (『富士大宮神事帳』) lists the "Kitayama Tousho Shrine Ritual" as one of the annual New Year ceremonies.<ref>{{Sfn|Collected Sengen Documents|1973|p=6}}{{Sfn|Goda|2004|p=41}}</ref>
Additionally, the "List of Annual Ceremonies for Fujisan Hongū" (『富士本宮年中祭礼之次第』), which has a colophon dated [[:en:Keian|Keian]] 3 (1650), also references the "Kitayama Tousho Shrine Ritual" under New Year activities.<ref>{{Sfn|Collected Sengen Documents|1973|p=18}}</ref>
== References == === Sources ===
{{Reflist}}
== Bibliography == * {{Cite book|和書 |author = Sengen Shrine Office |year = 1929 |title = History of Sengen Shrine |series = Studies on Mount Fuji |publisher = Kokon Shoin |isbn = |ref = {{SfnRef|History of Sengen Shrine|1929}} }} * {{Cite book|和書 |author = Sengen Shrine Office |year = 1973 |title = Collected Sengen Documents |series = |publisher = Meicho Kankokai |isbn = |ref = {{SfnRef|Collected Sengen Documents|1973}} }} *{{Cite journal|和書 |author = Takaki Goda |date = 2004 |title = Regional Networks of Fujisan Hongū Sengen Taisha during the Sengoku Period: An Analysis of the "Fujisan Hongū Ritual Records" |journal = Takeda Clan Studies |issue = 30 |isbn = |pages = 30-51 |ref = {{SfnRef|Goda|2004}} }} == See Also == * [[:en:Fujisan Hongū Sengen Taisha|Fujisan Hongū Sengen Taisha]]
{{Shinto Horizontal}}
{{translated page|ja|當所神社 (富士宮市)|version=99918434|comment=Imported full ja history}}

|deity=[[Susanoo-no-Mikoto]]{{Sfn|History of Sengen Shrine|1929|p=510}}
}}

'''Tousho Shrine''' (當所神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine}} located in Kitayama, {{ill|Fujinomiya, Shizuoka|en|Fujinomiya, Shizuoka|WD=Q496072|lt=Fujinomiya}}, {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|en|Shizuoka Prefecture|WD=Q131320|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture}}, Japan.

== Overview ==
The shrine was formerly a subordinate shrine (摂社) of the {{ill|Fujisan Hongū Sengen Taisha|en|Fujisan Hongū Sengen Taisha|WD=Q653180|lt=Fujisan Hongū Sengen Taisha}} and maintains a strong historical connection with it. For example, the {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 5 (1577) "Fujisan Hongū Sengen Shrine Ritual Records" (『富士大宮神事帳』) lists the "Kitayama Tousho Shrine Ritual" as one of the annual New Year ceremonies.<ref>{{Sfn|Collected Sengen Documents|1973|p=6}}{{Sfn|Goda|2004|p=41}}</ref>

Additionally, the "List of Annual Ceremonies for Fujisan Hongū" (『富士本宮年中祭礼之次第』), which has a colophon dated {{ill|Keian|en|Keian|WD=Q1146135|lt=Keian}} 3 (1650), also references the "Kitayama Tousho Shrine Ritual" under New Year activities.<ref>{{Sfn|Collected Sengen Documents|1973|p=18}}</ref>

== References ==

{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image=[[File:Tousho Shrine.jpg|250px]] {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=14|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|17|06.3|N|138|35|43.05|E}}}} |name=Tousho Shrine |location=Kitayama 2018, {{ill|Fujinomiya, Shizuoka|en|Fujinomiya, Shizuoka|WD=Q496072|lt=Fujinomiya|1=Fujinomiya, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|en|Shizuoka Prefecture|WD=Q131320|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}, Japan |Latitude degrees=35 |Latitude minutes=17 |Latitude seconds=06.3 |North/South=N |Longitude degrees=138 |Longitude minutes=35 |Longitude seconds=43.05 |East/West=E |Map Country Code=JP |deity=[[Susanoo-no-Mikoto]]{{Sfn|History of Sengen Shrine|1929|p=510}} }}
'''Tousho Shrine''' (當所神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Kitayama, {{ill|Fujinomiya, Shizuoka|en|Fujinomiya, Shizuoka|WD=Q496072|lt=Fujinomiya|1=Fujinomiya, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|en|Shizuoka Prefecture|WD=Q131320|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}, Japan.
== Overview == The shrine was formerly a subordinate shrine (摂社) of the {{ill|Fujisan Hongū Sengen Taisha|en|Fujisan Hongū Sengen Taisha|WD=Q653180|lt=Fujisan Hongū Sengen Taisha|1=Fujisan Hongū Sengen Taisha}} and maintains a strong historical connection with it. For example, the {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 5 (1577) "Fujisan Hongū Sengen Shrine Ritual Records" (『富士大宮神事帳』) lists the "Kitayama Tousho Shrine Ritual" as one of the annual New Year ceremonies.<ref>{{Sfn|Collected Sengen Documents|1973|p=6}}{{Sfn|Goda|2004|p=41}}</ref>
Additionally, the "List of Annual Ceremonies for Fujisan Hongū" (『富士本宮年中祭礼之次第』), which has a colophon dated {{ill|Keian|en|Keian|WD=Q1146135|lt=Keian|1=Keian}} 3 (1650), also references the "Kitayama Tousho Shrine Ritual" under New Year activities.<ref>{{Sfn|Collected Sengen Documents|1973|p=18}}</ref>
